title: Color Tokens — Shopify Polaris
insights: Complete v12 color token overhaul. Two token types: palette (private, used to create aliases) and alias (public for designers/devs). 12 core hues × 10-16 calibrated shades. Semantic --p-color-text replaces hex. Uniform contrast ratios across hues

title: Shopify/polaris-tokens GitHub
insights: npm @shopify/polaris-tokens. Full token architecture open-sourced. Typography, spacing, shadows, breakpoints, color. Good production reference for scale

title: Palettes and Roles — Shopify Polaris
insights: Palette tokens (private) vs alias tokens (public API). Color roles by intent not value name. Architecture decision rationale documented

title: Color Tokens — IBM Carbon Design System
insights: Role-based color token system. Themes specify values that serve roles. 4 themes: White, G10, G90, G100. New AI design token suite in 2024 for AI-specific components. Token files as JavaScript exports

title: Motion — IBM Carbon Design System
insights: Non-linear duration scale for perceived consistency across distances. Motion tokens categorized by expressiveness. IBM's production-proven motion token system

title: carbon-design-system/carbon GitHub
insights: IBM Carbon main repo. 7k+ stars. Complete design system with token foundation. Working code + design tools + guidelines. Reference for enterprise token scale

title: UI Color System — Primer (GitHub)
insights: Three levels: base (raw), functional (global UI patterns: text/borders/shadows/backgrounds), component/pattern (specific). CSS variables + Figma variables. 9 themes including light, dark, high-contrast. Resolved 1000+ color-contrast accessibility issues

title: primer/primitives GitHub
insights: Color, typography, spacing primitives as JSON. CSS variables + utility classes. Framework-agnostic: React, Rails. 9 themes (light, dark + high-contrast variants)

title: Design Tokens — Atlassian Design System
insights: Updated Oct 30 2024. Enables dark theme + improved accessibility. Tokens for: text, links, icons, backgrounds, borders, blankets, charts, skeleton loaders. Named by intent not color value. Light/dark/high-contrast modes supported

title: Design Tokens and Theming — Atlassian Developer
insights: Forge apps using Atlassian tokens mirror parent app theme. Non-color themes: density/motion/typography. Color token naming: property → role → emphasis → state. Contextual tokens for layering model

title: Design Tokens — U.S. Web Design System (USWDS)
insights: Federal government design token system. Tokens as keys that unlock values through functions/mixins. Nov 2024: new model with USWDS Tokens 1.0 as Style Dictionary-based standalone package targeting Sass/CSS/mobile

title: uswds/uswds GitHub
insights: Official USWDS repo. 6k+ stars. Production token system for US federal websites. Accessibility + mobile-first focus

title: Colors — Designsystemet (Norwegian Government)
insights: Norwegian public sector design system. Flexible token structure. Semantic color naming (success/danger/warning/info/neutral). Theme builder. Auto-contrast guarantee regardless of brand colors. V1 released 2024

title: Hopper Design System — Workleap
insights: React component library with OKLCH-friendly semantic tokens. Core + semantic token layers. Styled System-inspired API. TypeScript-based type-safe props. Sentiment-based color assignment

title: Semantic Color Tokens — Hopper Design System
insights: Core color tokens (raw) → semantic color tokens (intent). Sentiment-based color roles. Space tokens: inset (padding) + stack (margins) naming convention

title: Core Motion Tokens — Hopper Design System
insights: Production motion token examples: duration, easing. Shows how core→semantic aliasing works for animation tokens

title: Design Tokens — Nord Design System (Nordhealth)
insights: CSS custom properties as primary consumption method. Raw values automatically transformed to Sass/CSS/JSON. Active changelog with Jun 2024 and Apr 2024 updates. @nordhealth/tokens npm

title: Design Tokens Changelog — Nord Design System
insights: Active 2024 changelog. New sizing tokens added. Track evolution of production token systems

title: Design Tokens — Serendie Design System (Mitsubishi Electric)
insights: Mitsubishi Electric public release Nov 7 2024. Two-tier: reference tokens (raw) → system tokens (alias). JSON as Single Source of Truth. Auto-synced to Figma Variables. CC BY 4.0 licensed

title: serendie/design-token GitHub
insights: Open-source Mitsubishi Electric design tokens. JSON master files auto-synced to Figma Variables. React components + TypeScript

title: Open Props — CSS Variables as Design Tokens
insights: CSS-native token system. No deps, 21.3 kB. Colors, typography, spacing, borders, shadows, gradients, animations. CSS/PostCSS/JSON/JS formats. CDN or npm. 1M+ weekly npm downloads. Alternative to heavy UI frameworks

title: Synchronizing Figma Variables with Design Tokens — Nate Baldwin
insights: Intuit lead Nate Baldwin on bidirectional Figma Variables ↔ design tokens sync. Workflow patterns, code examples. Critical for design-dev alignment at enterprise scale

title: Guide to Variables in Figma — Figma Help
insights: Figma variables = design tokens in Figma. Support multiple modes (light/dark/density). Scoping for where variables apply. Code syntax for dev handoff. Export to JSON. 42.5% of teams adopted Figma variables as primary token source in 2024

title: Modes for Variables — Figma Help
insights: Each mode = different context (light/dark/compact/comfortable). One value per variable per mode. Export single mode or all modes as JSON. Core multi-mode token mechanism in Figma

title: Variables in Dev Mode — Figma Help
insights: Developer inspection of design tokens in Figma. Click variable name in Inspect panel → Variable details modal. CSS code snippets with token names. Dev Mode as design-dev handoff layer

title: Tokens Studio for Figma — Figma Community Plugin
insights: 264k+ users. Most popular design tokens plugin for Figma. W3C DTCG compliant, multi-mode, GitHub sync

title: Design Token Management — Supernova
insights: Figma → Supernova detects change → converts to CSS/Swift/Kotlin → PR in repo. Token pipeline automation. Separate token/component/asset overviews. Token blocks with health tracking

title: Specify — Design Token Engine
insights: Token management platform. Collaborative designer sync + developer integration. Part of growing token platform ecosystem alongside Supernova, Zeroheight

title: Design Tokens and Theming — Knapsack
insights: Knapsack enterprise token management. Non-engineers can edit color tokens that compile to real code. Replaced Style Dictionary with own token build tool. Figma Variables/Collections/Modes import. DTCG spec support

title: Design Tokens — Zeroheight
insights: Import tokens from JSON (W3C spec) or GitHub. Documentation-focused platform. W3C DTCG tokens manager compliance. Partner in DTCG specification development

title: telekom/design-tokens GitHub — Deutsche Telekom
insights: Source of truth for Telekom-branded digital products. Open-source under MPL 2.0 with neutral theme option. Brand assets (magenta, typeface) require separate permission

title: Inside Design Tokens: The Three Class Token Society — Thomas Gossmann
insights: Option tokens (primitives/globals) → decision tokens (aliases/semantic) → component tokens. Three-tier analysis with pros/cons. Component layer increases maintenance but improves DX. Token count vs developer experience trade-off

title: The Pyramid Design Token Structure — Stefanie Fluin
insights: Pyramid metaphor for token hierarchy. Bottom=global/primitive, middle=alias/semantic, top=component. Visual mnemonic for the standard three-tier architecture

title: Design Tokens Architecture in Tetrisly: Part 2 Taxonomy
insights: Real production taxonomy design from Tetrisly system. Detailed naming conventions, tier implementation, Figma variable mapping

title: Multi-Branded Design System with Tokens — Hike One (Signify/Philips)
insights: Real enterprise multi-brand case study. Philips Hue + Signify brands sharing component library. Single JSON file (~60 tokens) per brand. Adding 5th brand took 2 hours with zero component changes

title: Building a Design Token Ecosystem: Source of Truth to Automated Distribution
insights: CI/CD pipeline for tokens: JSON validator → Style Dictionary build → npm publish → semantic-release. Automated versioning via Conventional Commits. Production-ready token pipeline pattern

title: Implementing Multi-Brand Theming with Style Dictionary — Always Twisted
insights: Style Dictionary multi-brand theming tutorial. Brand token sets reference shared semantic tokens. Per-brand JSON → CSS/Sass/JS outputs
